title: Understanding the Product Rule
text: The product rule of exponents states that when you multiply two powers with the same base, you add the exponents.

title: Identify the Base
text: In the expression $$\left(\frac{2}{y}\right)^4 \frac{2}{y}$$, identify the common base that is being multiplied.

title: Apply the Product Rule
text: Using the product rule, add the exponents of the common base.

title: Simplify the Expression
text: After applying the product rule, simplify the expression to its final form.
